allow: Bash(MAYA_VERSION=2022 MAYA_PYTHON_VERSION=2 cmd /c "set MAYA_VERSION=2022 && set MAYA_PYTHON_VERSION=2 && QuickBuildWheel.bat")
Bash(cmd /c "set MAYA_VERSION=2022 && set MAYA_PYTHON_VERSION=2 && cd /d D:\\_Codes\\ManagedCodes\\Git\\maya-dem-bones && QuickBuildWheel.bat" 2>&1)
Bash(cmd /c "reg query HKLM\\\\SOFTWARE\\\\Autodesk\\\\Maya > C:\\\\Temp\\\\maya_reg.txt 2>&1 && type C:\\\\Temp\\\\maya_reg.txt")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "
\\$mayapy2 = 'C:\\Program Files\\Autodesk\\Maya2022\\bin\\mayapy2.exe'
Write-Host '=== Installing build deps ==='
& \\$mayapy2 -m pip install scikit-build setuptools wheel ninja cmake mypy 2>&1
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "
\\$mayapy2 = 'C:\\Program Files\\Autodesk\\Maya2022\\bin\\mayapy2.exe'
Write-Host '=== Installing build deps \(no mypy\) ==='
& \\$mayapy2 -m pip install scikit-build setuptools wheel ninja cmake 2>&1
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "
\\$skbuild_src = Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\zzheng\\AppData\\Roaming\\Python\\Python37\\site-packages\\skbuild' -Filter '*.py' -Recurse | Select-Object FullName
\\$skbuild_src | Where-Object { \\$_.FullName -match 'setuptools_wrap' } | Select-Object FullName
")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "
Select-String -Path 'C:\\Users\\zzheng\\AppData\\Roaming\\Python\\Python37\\site-packages\\skbuild\\setuptools_wrap.py' -Pattern 'lib' | Where-Object { \\$_.Line -match '\(cmake_install_dir|LIBDIR|lib_dir|lib/\)' } | Select-Object LineNumber, Line | Format-Table -Wrap
")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
\\$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\('D:\\_Codes\\ManagedCodes\\Git\\maya-dem-bones\\dist\\dem_bones-1.0.0-cp37-cp37m-win_amd64.whl'\)
\\$zip.Entries | Select-Object FullName | Sort-Object FullName
\\$zip.Dispose\(\)
")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "
Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'D:\\_Codes\\ManagedCodes\\Git\\maya-dem-bones\\_skbuild' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'D:\\_Codes\\ManagedCodes\\Git\\maya-dem-bones\\dist' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Write-Host 'Cleaned _skbuild and dist'
")
